title: UTV2-606: Thread SYNDICATE_MACHINE_ENABLED through AppEnv to fix board-scan gate

root_cause.summary: board-scan-service.ts reads `process.env['SYNDICATE_MACHINE_ENABLED']` directly as its fallback. The @unit-talk/config package never injects env vars into process.env — it returns a typed AppEnv object. As a result, SYNDICATE_MACHINE_ENABLED in local.env was never seen by board-scan, the gate always evaluated to false, and no candidates were ever materialized.
root_cause.evidence: API logs showed: {"service":"board-scan","event":"gate.skip","reason":"SYNDICATE_MACHINE_ENABLED=false","scanRunId":"ffbe33a9..."} on every 5-minute cycle despite local.env containing SYNDICATE_MACHINE_ENABLED=true

fix.summary: Add SYNDICATE_MACHINE_ENABLED to AppEnv interface and loadEnvironment() return object in packages/config/src/env.ts. Pass environment.SYNDICATE_MACHINE_ENABLED === 'true' as the explicit `enabled` option to both runBoardScan() call sites in apps/api/src/index.ts. The existing isSyndicateMachineEnabled(override?: boolean) function already prefers the explicit override — no changes to board-scan-service logic needed.

type_check.notes: Clean on main. Worktree errors are pre-existing Cannot find module artifacts from unbuilt packages.

runtime_proof.notes: Pre-fix: API logs gate.skip on every cycle (confirmed). Post-fix: isSyndicateMachineEnabled(override) returns override when provided — override is now environment.SYNDICATE_MACHINE_ENABLED (from config, not process.env). Full live runtime confirmation deferred to UTV2-586 burn-in window after merge.
runtime_proof.code_proof: board-scan-service.ts:51-53: if (override !== undefined) return override; — fix passes override=true when config reads SYNDICATE_MACHINE_ENABLED=true from local.env

governance_brake.notes: Governance brake (awaiting_approval) is independent of this fix — it applies at pick submission time in promotion-service.ts for autonomous sources. Board-scan writes to pick_candidates only (never picks). The brake proof is in UTV2-586 burn-in scope.

debt_resolution.description: system-pick-scanner quiesced 2026-04-10 — board-scan never enabled due to env var threading gap
debt_resolution.resolution_notes: SYNDICATE_MACHINE_ENABLED=true in local.env will now correctly flow through config → index.ts → board-scan options on next API restart post-merge
